name: Cherry Apple Scones
recipeIngredient: Skim milk or 1 beaten egg white
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Secrets of Fat-Free Baking, Sandra Woodruff
Preheat oven to 375 degrees. Coat a baking sheet with nonstick cooking spray.
Combine the flours, sugar, baking powder and baking soda; stir until well mixed.
Stir in the egg white and just enough applesauce to form a stiff dough. Stir in the dried cherries.
Form the dough into a ball and turn onto a lightly floured surface. With floured hands, pat the dough into an 7-inch circle.
Place the dough on the baking sheet and use a sharp, floured knife to cut it into 12 wedges. Pull the wedges out slightly to leave a 1/2-inch space between them.
Brush the tops lightly with skim milk or beaten egg white.
Bake for about 20 minutes, or until lightly browned. Transfer to a serving plate and serve hot with cherry fruit spread or apple jelly.
